stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, an operator shall not operate an aircraft in expected or actual icing conditions unless…

options.a: the aircraft is certificated and equipped to operate in icing conditions.
options.b: the aircraft is sprayed with anti-icing fluid before flight.
options.c: the aircraft is sprayed with de-icing fluid before flight.
options.d: the flight is planned so that a change of cruising level can be initiated rapidly.
